name: German Applesauce Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly oil a 9x5x3-inch loaf pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and mix well.
4. Place the meatloaf mixture in the prepared pan.
5. Bake for 1 1/2 to 2 hours.
6. Let cool for 10-15 minutes.
7. Turn off heat source.
8. Turn the loaf out of the pan.
9. Slice and serve.
